hindi: अनन्तं वासुकिं शेषं पद्मनाभं च कम्बलम्।
english: Ananta, Vasuki, Shesha, Padmanabha and Kambala
roman: Anantam Vasuki Shesham Padmanabham cha Kambalam

hindi: एतानि नव नामानि नागानां च महात्मनाम्।
english: These nine names of the great serpent deities
roman: Etani nava namani naganam cha mahatmanam

english: Reading them daily in the evening and especially in the morning
roman: Sayamkale pathet nityam pratah kale visheshatah

hindi: तस्य विषभयं नास्ति सर्वत्र विजयी भवेत्।
english: He has no fear of poison and becomes victorious everywhere
roman: Tasya visha bhayam nasti sarvatra vijayee bhavet

english: On Naga Panchami worship, the remover of all fear of snakes
roman: Naga panchami ko poojan sarpa bhaya harta

hindi: नागस्तोत्रमिदं पुण्यं यः पठेद् भक्तितः शुचिः।
english: This sacred Naga Stotram — whoever reads it with devotion and purity
roman: Naga stotram idam punyam yah pathed bhaktitah shuchihi

hindi: सर्पभयं न तस्यास्ति विषं नैव स्पृशेत् तनुम्॥
english: Has no fear of serpents and poison does not touch the body
roman: Sarpa bhayam na tasyasti visham naiva sprishet tanum
